# G4mra

> G4mra is a CTF and cybersecurity team focused on offensive security, web exploitation, reverse engineering, pwn, Active Directory, mobile security, cryptography, and competitive hacking.

## Site

- [Home](https://rylena.github.io/g4mrasite/): Team overview, rankings, certifications, member profiles, and official links.
- [Full LLM Context](https://rylena.github.io/g4mrasite/llms-full.txt): Expanded machine-readable summary of the team, member roster, specialties, and site sections.
- [Sitemap](https://rylena.github.io/g4mrasite/sitemap.xml): Crawlable site map.

## Key Topics

- Capture The Flag competitions
- Offensive security
- Web exploitation
- Reverse engineering
- Binary exploitation and pwn
- Active Directory
- Mobile security
- Cryptography
- Malware development and evasion research
